title: coelogyne fruticicola
intro: Coelogyne fruticicola, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to the Himalayan regions of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne fruticicola include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health conditions.
